name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE-CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Premium Adult Dog Food - Medium/Large Breed Senior Lamb & Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Give your senior dog the care they deserve with Reflex Plus Lamb & Rice high-protein, joint-supporting, and immune-boosting dry food for dogs over 7 years.
description: Complete and balanced formulated super premium dry dog food with lamb & rice for medium-large breeds older than 7 years of age. INGREDIENTS:? Lamb Proteins (dehydrated), Animal Proteins (dehydrated), Corn, Chicken Fat, Rice, Beet Pulp, Liver Flavour, Whey Powder, Vitamins and Minerals, Xylo-Oligosaccharides, Brewer?s Yeast, Linseed, Salt, Yucca Schidigera, Glucosamine, Chondroitin Sulphate, Preservatives - Antioxidants. MINERALS: ?Calcium, Phosphor, Sodium, lodine , Zinc, Copper, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS : Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (Niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (Biotin) - B9 (Folic Acid), v?T. k, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. NUTRIENT COMPOSITION NUTRITIVE ADDITIONS Crude Protein ?25% Vitamin A (E672) 18000 IU/kg Crude Fat ? 13% Vitamin D3(E671) ?1500 IU/kg Crude Ash ?7% Vitamin E (3A700) 150 mg/kg Crude Cellulose ( Fiber ) 2,5% Vitamin C (Stay C) 200 mg/kg RECOMMENDED FEEDING GUIDE: DOG' WEIGHT : 12 kg 15 kg 20 kg 25 kg 30 kg 35 kg 40 kg 45 kg DOG SILHOUETTE A - Thin 225 - 249 g 266 - 294 g 330 - 365 g 390 - 431 g 447 - 494 g 502 - 555 g 555 -614 g 606 - 670 g B -? Normal 196 - 217 g 232 - 256 g 288 - 318 g 340 - 376 g 390 - 431 g 438 - 484 g 484 - 535 g 528 - 584 g C - Overweight 170 - 188 g 202 - 223 g 250 - 276 g 296 - 327 g 339 - 375 g 380 - 421 g 421 - 465 g 459 - 508 g IMPORTANT AND TO KNOW: ? Recommended daily feeding amount (grams per day) according to the dog's bodyweight (kg) and silhouette (A-Thin, B-Normal or C-Overweight), see chart. ? Daily ration can vary linked to ambient temperature, dog's lifestyle (indoor-outdoor), temperament and activity. ? In order to ensure ideal body weight of your dog, weigh out the quantity of food. ? To provide the correct portions, assess your dog's appetite, visual appearance and stools. ? Switch over from one food to another should be done gradually by mixing small amounts of both foods during a period of one week. ? Ensure that your dog has permanent access to fresh water. Even if the water seems clear, change it at least daily. ? Keep the product in a dry and cool place and be sure the food bag is properly closed after each feeding. ? Batch number, factory registration number and best before date, see packaging.
